subcodes.first_line: O believing leaf! The favors of the Ancient Beauty in this Dispensation toward the handmaidens of the Merciful are great, great indeed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مومنه الطاف جمال قدم در این کور در حق اماء الرحمن عظیم است عظیم
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
